_doc: D3 follow-up cadence config. Drives routing decisions in lib/d3-cadence.ts based on Phase 0a scrub bucket + recency + reply state. Templates referenced here live in scripts/outreach/ as DRAFT until Alex approval.

config.follow_up_schedule_days_note: Standard cadence for active_eligible records that haven't replied. Day 3 = first follow-up, Day 7 = second, Day 14 = final. After Day 14 + no reply within auto_dead_no_followup_reply_days, record auto-deads.
config.drift_threshold_pct_note: List_Price change vs stored List_Price-at-send. Drift down >10% → follow_up_drift_down template. Drift up >10% → hold + Manual Review banner. Within ±10% → standard follow_up_3/7/14.
config.auto_dead_no_status_check_reply_days_not: If status_check probe gets no reply within 3 days, record → Pipeline_Stage=dead, Outreach_Status=Dead.
config.auto_dead_no_followup_reply_days_note: If no reply within 14 days after follow_up_14 fires, record → Pipeline_Stage=dead, Outreach_Status=Dead.
config.manual_review_banner_drift_up: PRICE DRIFT UP — seller got aggressive, review before sending
config.recently_touched_window_days_note: Layer 1 depth-gate widening (5/15 Alex directive): if an agent's phone was touched within this window on a DIFFERENT listing — regardless of that other listing's current Outreach_Status — treat the current listing as a warm contact. Catches the case where the prior listing went Dead but the human agent still remembers our outreach. Matches the 30-day stale-records threshold from the bulk-dead policy.
